title: Coco & Gray Fruit Glass Worktop Saver – Chopping Board Counter Protector, 2 Assorted Design
features: Four raised rubber feet to reduce slip
Two assorted designs; lemons and strawberries
description: Bring colour and practicality to your kitchen with the Coco & Gray Fruit Glass Worktop Saver. Designed with vibrant fruit patterns in two assorted designs, this stylish tempered glass board is perfect for everyday food preparation. It protects your work surfaces from scratches, marks, and heat while providing a hygienic, easy-to-clean surface for chopping, slicing, or serving. Durable and heat resistant, it doubles as a trivet for hot pans and dishes. Whether you’re preparing meals or simply adding a decorative touch to your countertop, this Coco & Gray glass worktop saver is a versatile and essential addition to any kitchen.
